title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. italicum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. italicum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. italicum include relief from wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
